name: icho648-skills
description: Searchable collection of Agent Skills by icho648: durable project agent guidance setup and grounded explanation.

plugins.name: setup-agent-guidance
plugins.description: Initialize or refresh durable project agent guidance: detect AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, install a progressive workflow and PLANS.md, then scan the repository to draft project-specific rules and code_review.md with explicit user confirmation.

plugins.name: grounded-explainer
plugins.description: Explain an object's unique core and necessary implementation starting from a concrete scenario and the existing problem it solves. Triggered only by explicit $grounded-explainer invocation.
